1011000011000011 0001100110111111 0 -> sum: 1100101010000010, cout: 0
0101000110010100 0100110001110101 1 -> sum: 1001111000001010, cout: 0
0100011111000110 0001010000010010 1 -> sum: 0101101111011001, cout: 0
0100011001111011 0100100110101101 1 -> sum: 1001000000101001, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
